clue: It's been a really hot summer. Where did we all have to camp when nights were too steamy?
celebration: Nice and cool! Great start, explorers! 🥶

clue: We aren't in the ocean, but I'm still a big white whale!
You can find cups of tea and maybe even go for a swim here?
hint: You may also get lots of hugs

clue: If you'd want to see all of Brisbane, you have to go very high - where should we head?
hint: Sometimes we've seen people fly drones up there
celebration: Let me know what you can see!

clue: This is where Mum likes to go to be zen, it's her favourite place on Mt Coot-tha. Lottie and Toby also like it even though it doesn't have sushi or ramen to eat.
hint: It's Japanese and has stepping stones
celebration: Nice deep breaths - you're calm and doing well!

clue: The adventure really begins. We need to find a ferry stop that has two A's and two T's in its name.
I like to go round and round. I take you very high, I take you very low. What am I?
hint: You've ridden me a few times. You get excited to do it, but always say it bores you.
celebration: The Big Wheel is right! Well done explorers!

clue: You now need to get to Central Station. Where can you go to find something to ride there?
celebration: CHOO CHOO!!! Onto the big smoke!!!

clue: Now you need to find a hotel nearby (Mom and Dad have a map). Your destination looks like they smashed SOFT and HOTEL together. Where is it?
celebration: Dad is very forgetful, you found his jumper!!!

clue: Wow, what a big day! You need to figure out a way for everyone to go to the place we love and are a family, where we'll have a lovely Easter party.
celebration: HAPPY EASTER FOR THE MCKEE FAMILY!!!!!!!!!!!
